Editor within an eui-card and reactive form (custom) validations
Restricted to my unit only
@if (form.get('htmlContent').hasError('required') && form.get('htmlContent').touched) { This field is required } @if (form.get('htmlContent').hasError('minLength') && form.get('htmlContent').touched) { Minimum length for this field is {{ form.get('htmlContent').errors.minLength.minLength }} and is currently {{ form.get('htmlContent').errors.minLength.actual }} } @if (form.get('htmlContent').hasError('maxLength') && form.get('htmlContent').touched) { Maximum length for this field is {{ form.get('htmlContent').errors.maxLength.maxLength }} and is currently {{ form.get('htmlContent').errors.maxLength.actual }} }
Editable card sample
Card title @if (!isEditActive) {
} @if (isEditActive) {
}
@if (form.get('htmlContent2').hasError('required') && form.get('htmlContent2').touched) { This field is required } @if (form.get('htmlContent2').hasError('minLength') && form.get('htmlContent2').touched) { Minimum length for this field is {{ form.get('htmlContent2').errors.minLength.minLength }} and is currently {{ form.get('htmlContent2').errors.minLength.actual }} } @if (form.get('htmlContent2').hasError('maxLength') && form.get('htmlContent2').touched) { Maximum length for this field is {{ form.get('htmlContent2').errors.maxLength.maxLength }} and is currently {{ form.get('htmlContent2').errors.maxLength.actual }} }
